## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between StackBlitz and GrowthX to discuss progress on content generation projects and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has made significant progress on template generation and competitor comparison workflows](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [StackBlitz is undergoing a website redesign, potentially moving to Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Priority is to create a templates page for the upcoming hackathon (May 30th)](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Need to balance accuracy and maintainability for competitor comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)

## Topics

### Template Generation Progress

  - [Created \~30 one-shot prompts for websites, apps, and micro-apps](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Developed custom workflows for generating briefs and companion articles](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Companion articles include SEO-focused intros, prompt engineering tips, and customization guidance](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Considering both usefulness and search volume for template topics](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Competitor Comparison Approach

  - [Developed feature matrix comparing StackBlitz to competitors across various categories](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Created custom workflow for generating comparison articles with persona-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Balancing need for accuracy with maintainability of competitor information](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
  - [Focusing on direct competitors initially, being cautious with claims about competitors](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Website Integration and CMS

  - [StackBlitz considering move to Webflow for marketing site and CMS](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
  - [GrowthX can set up staging Webflow account to start populating content](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [Possibility of creating static pages as interim solution before full CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

### Templates Page and Community Engagement

  - [Priority to create a templates page for the upcoming hackathon (May 30th)](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [Plan to allow user-generated content submissions in the future](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2806.0)
  - [Considering features like commenting and creator profiles to foster community engagement](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)

### User Research and Personas

  - [GrowthX has created initial personas (e.g., internal tool builder, web designer)](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [KJ to provide additional data on user frustrations from prompt analysis](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
  - [User interviews may be deprioritized to focus on template creation for hackathon](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2811.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send 5 competitor comparison articles and 5-10 templates with supporting articles by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2750.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up staging Webflow account and begin CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)
  - [StackBlitz to review timeline for website redesign and provide feedback on initial content](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [Focus on creating a functional templates page for the May 30th hackathon](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [StackBlitz to review and provide feedback on GrowthX's voice guidelines and persona definitions](https://fathom.video/share/oHTHxRHhcwkTCerzc7j58LyEtUuA2vq1?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
